project_type: AWS CDK TypeScript project - event-driven sleep audio processing pipeline
test_framework: jest with ts-jest, aws-cdk-lib/assertions for CDK stack testing, jest mocks for Lambda unit tests
verification_instructions: 1. Run `unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx jest --no-coverage` to verify all tests pass. 2. Run `unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx cdk synth --context environment=dev` to verify CDK synthesis. 3. Confirm snapshot is up to date (run jest -u if needed after intentional changes).
snapshot_or_generated_files: test/__snapshots__/cdk-base.test.ts.snap - regenerated by `unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx jest --no-coverage -u`
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode. Node.js 22 available. npm registry accessible. No AWS credentials - cannot run actual CDK deploy. Must use `unset NODE_OPTIONS` before running npm/npx commands due to sandbox NODE_OPTIONS conflict.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits required. Strict TDD (write failing test first, then implement). Keep ARCHITECTURE.md in sync. Use L2/L3 CDK constructs. Run tests + cdk synth before committing.
key_patterns: CDK stack tests use Template.fromStack() with Match helpers. Lambda tests use jest.mock() for AWS SDK clients. Snapshot test for full synthesized template. State machine definition validated via string parsing of Fn::Join parts.
directory_structure: bin/ - CDK app entry point. lib/ - CDK stack definitions (cdk-base-stack.ts, pipeline-stack.ts). test/ - Jest tests + __snapshots__/. lambda/audio-processor/ - Lambda handler code. .github/workflows/ - CI config.
